title: Leasing Support and Vacancy Strategy
shortSummary: Support occupancy by coordinating renewals, make-good, handbacks, fitouts, and the operational readiness behind leasing outcomes.
whyItMatters: Property managers do not 'own' leasing, but they shape leasing outcomes constantly. Renewal confidence, vacancy readiness, handback quality, fitout coordination, and building presentation all affect the speed and quality of occupancy decisions. Strong managers understand how their operational execution influences vacancy risk and leasing momentum.
coreConcepts: Where property management most strongly affects leasing outcomes
The operational checklist behind renewals and handbacks
Why vacancy strategy starts before a tenant leaves
How fitout quality and speed influence market perception
